action_set_definitions.name: get_request_details
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the user ID and specific details for a given GDPR request ID.

request_id.description: The unique identifier of the GDPR request (e.g., 'REQ-8821').

action_set_definitions.name: check_legal_hold
action_set_definitions.description: Checks the legal hold registry to see if a user's data is exempt from deletion due to statutory obligations.

user_id.description: The unique identifier for the user.

action_set_definitions.name: fetch_user_data_inventory
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the categories of data held for a specific user within the LegacyPay system (e.g., PII, Financial, Logs).

action_set_definitions.name: get_ropa_disposition_rules
action_set_definitions.description: Queries the Record of Processing Activities (RoPA) for the required technical treatment (Hard Delete, Anonymize, or Mask) for specific data categories to maintain referential integrity.

categories.description: List of data categories found in the user inventory.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_data_erasure
action_set_definitions.description: Applies the specified erasure methods to the user's data in the environment.

disposition_map.description: The specific methods to apply to each category.

action_set_definitions.name: close_request_with_audit
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the request status to completed and records the final compliance audit entry.

request_id.description: The ID of the request to close.

audit_note.description: A detailed note explaining the compliance outcome, including methods used or exemptions applied.

state_description.user_records: A mapping of user IDs to their profile information, including PII and account status.
state_description.pending_requests: A list of active GDPR 'Right to Erasure' requests waiting for processing.
state_description.legal_holds: A list of user IDs whose data must be preserved for legal or regulatory reasons, preventing deletion.
state_description.audit_trail: An internal log of all processed actions for compliance auditing.
